creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Zane C. Bowers-Hadley from comment #1)

> This script absolutely does not work for what it is intended to do.

It's intended to work either with the default repo config (everything comes from pkg.freebsd.org) or full Poudruere/Synth config (everything is built from source). The fancy stuff tends to break it, but those users are presumably smart enough to handle that.

Also, I'm surprised that configuration even works — you are not supposed to have amd64 and i386 repos in a single config. Anyway, if you want real improvement, you need to address your complaints at https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/issues.
